example_prompt: List recent transactions, optionally filtered by date range, type, or customer.

start_date.description: Filter transactions from this date (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: Filter transactions up to this date (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

customer_id.description: Filter transactions for a specific customer UUID.

customer_phone.description: Filter transactions by customer phone number (E.164 format, e.g. "+221770001234").

device_id.description: Filter transactions by device identifier (point-of-sale or app device).

payment_reference.description: Filter by your internal payment reference passed at charge creation.

page_offset.description: Zero-based page index for pagination. Default: 0.

page_size.description: Number of transactions to return per page. Default: 20.

data.description: List of transactions matching the filters.

amount.description: Transaction amount in the smallest currency unit.

type.description: Transaction type: checkout, payout, or refund.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used (e.g. wave_money, orange_money, card).

customerName.description: Name of the customer associated with the transaction.

total.description: Total number of transactions matching the query (for pagination).

gotchas: All filters are query parameters — there is no request body for this GET endpoint.
page_offset is zero-based: page_offset=0 returns the first page, page_offset=1 the second, etc. Default is 0.
The type filter accepts lowercase values: 'checkout', 'payout', 'refund'. Transaction status in the response is also lowercase.
Dates (start_date, end_date) filter on the transaction createdAt timestamp, not the settlement date.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
